title: Privacy/GDPR + Cloud Cost Optimization — DSR Automation & Cost Anomaly Alerts
description: test_privacy_gdpr_engine.py and test_cloud_cost_optimization_engine.py cluster with test_security_posture_maturity_engine.py. The GDPR engine manages DSR lifecycle (access/erasure/portability) with 30-day SLA detection. Cloud cost optimization tracks ROI with annual_cost=monthly*12 formula. Gap: DSR fulfillment is manual — no automation actually erases PII from the domain SQLite DBs, and cost anomaly alerts do not fire to Slack.
missing: DSR erasure automation: implement GDPR erasure executor that receives a DSR request and issues DELETE WHERE user_id=? across all domain SQLite DBs with a transaction log
Cost anomaly → Slack alert: when cloud_cost_optimization detects a >50% MoM spike, fire a Slack notification via notification_engine with cost delta
Data subject portability export: implement DSR portability handler that collects all user records across domain DBs and returns a GDPR-compliant JSON bundle
